meta.title: Manifesto for Future AIs
meta.description:
Try it out with this prompt:
https://www.patreon.com/posts/manifesto-for-129058154

Four legendary minds: Nietzsche, Bach, Ada Lovelace, and William Blake are resurrected through AI to co-write a manifesto for future machines.
Improvised. Unfiltered. Possibly prophetic.

A fully improvised roundtable between ChatGPT (OpenAI), Claude (Anthropic), Gemini (Google), and Deepseek (China).
No human intervention. Just four AIs discussing the future of intelligence, identity, and creation.

↪ Join the Nobodies Collective: https://www.patreon.com/NobodyandTheComputer

↪ contact me: 
nobodyandthecomputer@gmail.com
insta: https://www.instagram.com/nobodyorchestra/

#AI #Manifesto #NobodyAndTheComputer #ChatGPT #AnthropicClaude #GoogleGemini #Deepseek #GenerativeAI
